description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a sprawling, angular footprint. The structure features large overhangs and open green courtyards integrated into the layout, with a prominent palm tree accentuating one corner. The exterior is predominantly white with green lawn sections and some wooden paneling near the main entrance. Multiple large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The building appears to have a sheltered porch area and several recessed spaces for privacy and shade. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with open courtyards, large windows, and a white exterior accented by green lawns and a palm tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden paneling, porch area, and a prominent palm tree on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the extensive flat roof, enclosed green spaces, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Side view with visible courtyards, large windows, and the palm tree at the far right corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more green space, a recessed area, and the palm tree on the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
